sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72135" key="o)zale/os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀζᾰλέος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὄζος</etym>) <sense id="n72135.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">branching,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.249</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Maec.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
